zh.Calverley, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Scot de Calverley於1210年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親Sir Roger Calverley31歲，母親Lady Jursella of Balwearie21歲。他與Mabel Stapleton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1261年5月27日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Calverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Scot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Although this was in use as a personal name both before and after the Norman Conquest, modern use in most cases almost certainly represents a transferred use of the surname. This originated as a byname for someone from Scotland or, within Scotland itself, for a member of the Gaelic-speaking people who originally came from Ireland. The given name is now often chosen by parents conscious of their Scottish ancestry and heritage, but it is also used more widely.

en.lifeSummary: When William Scot de Calverley was born in 1210, in Calverley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Roger Calverley, was 31 and his mother, Lady Jursella of Balwearie, was 21. He married Mabel Stapleton. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 27 May 1261, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Scot de Calverley est né en 1210, à Calverley, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Calverley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Jursella of Balwearie, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mabel Stapleton. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1261, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Scot de Calverley 1210 in Calverley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Calverley 31 und seine Mutter Lady Jursella of Balwearie 21. Er hat Mabel Stapleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1261 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: William Scot de Calverleyが1210年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Calverleyは31歳，母Lady Jursella of Balwearieは21歳であった。Mabel Stapletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1261年5月27日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Scot de Calverley(이)가 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Calverley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jursella of Balwearie(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Mabel Stapleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1261년 5월 27일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Scot de Calverley родился в 1210 г. в местности калвирли, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Calverley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Jursella of Balwearie, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel Stapleton. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 мая 1261 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.
